    Method
    Description
    org.openapitools.codegen.ClientOptInput.auth(String)
    org.openapitools.codegen.ClientOptInput.getAuth()
    org.openapitools.codegen.ClientOptInput.getAuthorizationValues()
    org.openapitools.codegen.ClientOptInput.getConfig()
    org.openapitools.codegen.ClientOptInput.getGeneratorSettings()
    org.openapitools.codegen.ClientOptInput.getOpenAPI()
    org.openapitools.codegen.ClientOptInput.setAuth(String)
    org.openapitools.codegen.ClientOptInput.setConfig(CodegenConfig)
    use ClientOptInput.config(CodegenConfig) instead
    org.openapitools.codegen.ClientOptInput.setOpenAPI(OpenAPI)
    use ClientOptInput.openAPI(OpenAPI) instead
    org.openapitools.codegen.CodegenProperty.getDatatype()
    since version 3.0.0, use CodegenProperty.getDataType() instead.
    May be removed with the next major release (4.0)
    org.openapitools.codegen.CodegenProperty.setDatatype(String)
    use
    invalid @link 
    #setDataType()
    instead.
